ddls:
CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "protein_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the protein affected by the variant */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the variant within the protein */,
  "residue_ref" TEXT /* Reference residue at the variant position */,
  "residue_alt" TEXT /* Alternate residue introduced by the variant */,
  "score" REAL /* Score indicating the impact of the variant */,
  "prediction_cutoff" TEXT /* Cutoff value used for prediction */,
  "seq_count" INTEGER /* Count of sequences analyzed for the variant */,
  "cluster_count" INTEGER /* Count of clusters associated with the variant */,
  "prediction_score" REAL /* Score used for the prediction type */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction made for the variant */,
  "median_info" REAL /* Median information value for the variant */,
  "seq_count_type" INTEGER /* Count of sequences associated with the prediction type */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome on which the variant is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the variant on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the variant on the chromosome */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of variant (e.g., SNV, indel, CNV) */,
  "functional_impact" TEXT /* Predicted functional impact of the variant on the protein */,
  "pathogenicity" TEXT /* Predicted pathogenicity of the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Gene name associated with the protein */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism in which the protein is found */,
  "protein_function" TEXT /* Function of the protein */,
  "protein_structure" TEXT /* Structure of the protein (e.g., 3D coordinates) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proteins_organism FOREIGN KEY ("organism") REFERENCES organisms ("organism_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proteins_gene_name FOREIGN KEY ("gene_name") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant for which the prediction is made */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction (e.g., deleterious, damaging) */,
  "prediction_score" REAL /* Score associated with the prediction */,
  "cutoff_value" TEXT /* Cutoff value used for the prediction */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant for which the sequence is analyzed */,
  "sequence_data" TEXT /* Sequence data in string format */,
  "sequence_type" TEXT /* Type of sequence (e.g., reference, alternate) */,
  "sequence_quality" REAL /* Quality of the sequence data */,
  "sequence_coverage" INTEGER /* Coverage of the sequence data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant associated with the cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "cluster_size" INTEGER /* Size of the cluster */,
  "cluster_function" TEXT /* Function of the cluster */,
  "cluster_structure" TEXT /* Structure of the cluster (e.g., 3D coordinates) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clusters_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution with which the user is affiliated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the variant */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the variant was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the variant */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the user to access the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisms" (
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organism */,
  "organism_name" TEXT /* Name of the organism */,
  "taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* Taxonomy identifier for the organism */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom to which the organism belongs */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum to which the organism belongs */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class to which the organism belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organism in which the gene is found */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_organism_id FOREIGN KEY ("organism_id") REFERENCES organisms ("organism_id")
)
